evals.prompt: fix my annotations on the learning page
evals.expected_output: Calls read_annotations filtered to the learning page URL, presents a summary of what was found, implements the changes, deletes the annotations, and takes a verification screenshot.
Calls read_annotations without a URL filter to discover all pending annotations, presents what was found grouped by page, asks the user which page to focus on before proceeding.
Calls read_annotations with the exact sessions URL, displays the annotations found (or says none exist), then asks whether to implement them.

evals.prompt: implement the annotations for the goals page
evals.expected_output: Maps 'goals page' to /goals URL, reads annotations, implements changes using Aleph design tokens (not raw hex), deletes annotations when done.
